title: hedeoma oblongifolia var. oblongifolia
intro: Hedeoma oblongifolia var. oblongifolia, also known as prairie balm, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of prairie balm include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and skin irritations. Prairie balm can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
